questions.question: The author says Jesus Christ is the same when?
questions.feedback: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever.

questions.question: The author says some who showed hospitality to strangers unknowingly entertained whom?
questions.feedback: Some have entertained angels without knowing it.

questions.question: The author says to obey your leaders and submit to their authority.
questions.feedback: Obey your leaders and submit to them, for they keep watch over your souls.

questions.question: Keep your lives free from the love of _____ and be content with what you have.
questions.feedback: Keep free from the love of money and be content with what you have.

questions.question: Through Jesus let us continually offer to God a sacrifice of _____ — the fruit of lips that confess his name.
questions.feedback: Offer God a sacrifice of praise — the fruit of lips that confess his name.
